item.name: Requested Items Not Registered As API Routes

request.description: Not registered in routes/api.php: admin services CRUD, admin customers list, admin payments list, admin reports, notification list/mark-read, health/debug route, standalone create payment/order route, payout detail route, and COD payment update route. Some related web controllers exist, but they are not API routes.
